title: Antecedents of data analytics adoption: A systematic literature review from 2018-2024
author: Madurapperuma, Wasanthi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains the PRISMA 2020 checklist and supporting documentation for the systematic literature review titled  “Antecedents of data analytics adoption: A systematic literature review from 2018–2024.”  The dataset provides transparency in reporting by outlining inclusion/exclusion criteria, data extraction methods, and quality assessment steps. It enables replication and verification of findings while offering a resource for future research on data analytics adoption.
steps_raw: This dataset contains the PRISMA 2020 checklist and supporting documentation for the systematic literature review titled  “Antecedents of data analytics adoption: A systematic literature review from 2018–2024.”  The dataset provides transparency in reporting by outlining inclusion/exclusion criteria, data extraction methods, and quality assessment steps. It enables replication and verification of findings while offering a resource for future research on data analytics adoption.
keywords: Data analytics  Adoption  Systematic literature review  PRISMA  Technology adoption  Business intelligence  Digital transformation
